# SportsDash

Scores, schedules, standings, and related sports data pages.

- Site: https://sportsdash.online/
- Discovery map: https://sportsdash.online/discover.html
- Sitemap: https://sportsdash.online/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://sportsdash.online/robots.txt

## Related owned resources

- [EconoJabis](https://econojabis.com/) - FINANCE
- [HowMuchIs](https://howmuchis.info/) - FINANCE
- [Halculator](https://halculator.com/) - CALC
- [WealthwiseHub](https://wealthwise-hub-71.lovable.app/) - FINANCE

## Safe monetization hardening

- Sponsored and affiliate links use nofollow/sponsored attributes.
- Affiliate clicks are tracked with GA4 affiliate_click where the page has GA enabled.
- Popup, popunder, social-bar, and redirect-style display ad loaders remain disabled.
